content:
✔ Rules for Transformative Paths:
• Not every archetype can become every transformation.
• Some paths only open to certain alignment types (Lawful, Neutral, Chaotic).
• Transformations offer new powers, restrictions, and consequences.

✔ Finalized Transformative Paths:
1️⃣ Lawful (Structured Power Paths – “The Order of Legends”)
• Mythic Ascension (Becoming a legendary hero) → Only available to Warriors, Scribes, & Guardians.
• Example Transformations:
• Achilles (The Invincible Warrior) – Can never be challenged in combat, but has one fatal flaw.
• King Arthur (The Righteous Leader) – Gains supreme faction power, but must follow all faction votes.
• Dante (The Divine Poet) – Can rewrite a portion of the rules but must sacrifice XP to do so.

2️⃣ Neutral (Adaptive, Shifting Paths – “The Trickster’s Gambit”)
• Duality Evolution (Split Identity or Hidden Power) → Only available to Oracles, Wanderers, & Tricksters.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 490 (chunk 490/555)
